markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on internal linking strategy for Navan content.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Combined Strategy:** The approach will blend growthx.ai's automated linking (via the Atlas platform) with Navan's strategic manual linking.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Navan's Strategic Focus:** Use Google Search Console (GSC) data to find "low-hanging fruit"—pages with high impressions but low average rankings—and link to them to improve their performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** Navan will provide a priority URL list with sample anchor texts for growthx.ai to integrate into the workflow. The list will be refreshed every 2–3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Current Process

  - [**Automated Linking (Atlas Platform):**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Uses the site map and URL slugs to identify linking opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
      - [Anchors links to relevant keywords connected to the destination URL's slug.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Manual Linking:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [Supplements automation based on the broader SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [Follows best practices: anchor text must accurately describe the destination content.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Link Density:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [No strict rule; avoids over-linking.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Typical range: 5–10 links per 1,500–2,000 word article.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Navan's Strategic Approach

  - [**Goal:** Drive performance by targeting "low-hanging fruit" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
    1.  [Analyze GSC data for a specific keyword (e.g., "expense management").](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
    2.  [Identify the page ranking for that keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
    3.  [Link to the destination with the highest impressions and lowest average ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This method leverages existing keyword authority to boost pages that are already getting traffic but need a ranking push.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Moran (Navan):**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Provide a priority URL list with sample anchor texts.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Review the three new articles and add linking comments to the docs.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Aida (growthx.ai):**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Integrate Navan's priority list into the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Investigate automating the integration of future priority lists.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRw1jXdMBAZnNHngEbUDbkTjVirD-t8?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
